ClaudeCommand Settings

Captures are rendered through the prompt template below and handed to the Claude Code CLI in the background. The named skill does the actual processing.

Skill & prompt
Invoked as /<skill> inside the prompt. The skill's implementation lives in the Claude Code project the CLI runs in — not in this app.
Placeholders: {skillInvocation} {skill} {source} {timestamp} {content} {file}
Claude Code CLI
Hotkeys
Electron accelerator syntax, e.g. CommandOrControl+Alt+T. Leave blank to disable a hotkey.
